ab: Nakaw, i luma’ kisu haw?
en: Nakaw, are you home?

ab: tinitu, kapicumud.
en: Yes, come on in.

ab: Kawpil, i luma’ kisu haw?
en: Kawpil, are you home?

ab: nayay i luma’ ci Kawpil! ci Tamana kaku. sikawaw haw? sakamu hantu nu maku taluma’ ci Kawpil.
ch: B:Kawpil不在家耶!我是Tamana，有什麼事嗎?回來我會轉告Kawpil。
en: Kawpil is not at home. I am Tamana. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.

ab: cima kamu saw?
en: Who are you?

ab: bai, ci Kawpil atu ci Tamana kami, wawahen ku panan!
ch: B:奶奶，我們是Kawpil和Tamana，幫我們開門!
en: Grandma, we are Kawpil and Tamana, please open the door for us.

ab: cima saw?
en: Who is it?

ab: ci Kawpil kaku, tayni mikilim ci Utayan.
en: I am Kawpil, I am here for Utayan.

ab: bai, tayni kaku miazih/miadihi i tisuwan.
en: Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: matenes tu kisu caay katayni, mabulah tu kaku i tisuwan.
ch: A:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.

ab: Tipus, tayni kaku midang i tisuwan.
en: Tipus, I am here to play with you.

ab: kapicumud, matenes tu kaku muhalhal i tisuwan.
en: Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: nipalumaan aku kuyni a tubah, kanamay!
ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看!
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!

ab: sicedam kina tubah.
en: The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: awza! nipalumaan aku a heci kuyni, kanamay.
ch: A:過來!這是我種的水果，吃看看。
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.

ab: sicedam kina heci.
en: The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: enenga! nipalumaan aku caay ku nisiwdukan a kubkub kanamay!
ch: A:請坐!這是我種的有機玉米吃看看!
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.

ab: hubaw! kasicedam knina kubkub.
en: Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.

ab: maydih kisu mukan tu kama haw?
en: Do you want some oranges?

ab: la’cus kaku mukan tu kama, u linggu ku kanen aku.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.

ab: maydih kisu mukan tu piyang haw?
en: Would you want some cookies?

ab: hang, manamuh kaku.
en: Sure, I like it very much.

ab: pudacen aku ku heci pakan i tisuwan.
en: Let me peel the fruit for you.

ab: kukay, sisalang kina heci.
en: Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.

ab: kukay.
en: Thank you.

ab: yadahen ku nikan, yadah ku nisalami’an nu maku.
en: Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ab: hubaw! tatenga’ bangsis sa asu’ aca.
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.

ab: yadahen ku nikan, yadah henay itini.
en: Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.

ab: a caay kasikaz/kasikad kaku yu!
en: I’ll make myself at home then.

ab: yadahen ku nikan, yadah henay itini.
en: Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.

ab: yadah tuway ku nikan aku, la’cus tu mukan.
ch: B:我吃了好多，不能再吃了。
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
